name: p-team
description: Distributed AI team document collaboration plugin — pure prompt, zero code. Manage design docs across multiple AI agents with Git-native diff awareness and collaborator identity tracking.

interface.shortDescription: AI team document collaboration via Git
interface.longDescription: PhoenixTeam manages distributed AI team design documents with Git-native diff tracking, collaborator identity mapping, and automatic document normalization. Works as a pure prompt plugin — zero code required.
